toolUseResult.originalFile:
name: Run Engine Tests
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      playwright-grep:
        description: 'Grep filter for Playwright tests (e.g. @fast)'
        required: false
        default: ''
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      playwright-grep:
        description: 'Grep filter for Playwright tests (e.g. @fast)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 10 * * 1-5'  # weekdays at 10am UTC
  push:
    branches: [ main, test/**, ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

env:
  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true

jobs:
    Check-Changes:
        # Skip scheduled runs if no commits in the last 24h
        if: github.event_name != 'schedule' || true
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        outputs:
          has_changes: ${{ steps.check.outputs.has_changes }}
        steps:
        - uses: actions/checkout@v4
          if: github.event_name == 'schedule'
          with:
            fetch-depth: 0
            token: ${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}
        - name: Check for recent commits
          id: check
          run: |
            if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" != "schedule" ]; then
              echo "has_changes=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              exit 0
            fi
            RECENT=$(git log --since="24 hours ago" --oneline --branches=dev --branches=main | head -1)
            if [ -n "$RECENT" ]; then
              echo "has_changes=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              echo "Recent commits found, running tests"
            else
              echo "has_changes=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              echo "No recent commits, skipping tests"
            fi

    Install:
        needs: Check-Changes
        if: needs.Check-Changes.outputs.has_changes == 'true'
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        outputs:
          cache-key: ${{ steps.cache-key.outputs.key }}
        steps:
        - uses: actions/checkout@v4
          with:
            submodules: false
            token: ${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}

        - name: Initialize specific submodules
          run: |
            git config --global url."https://x-access-token:${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/"
            git submodule update --init modules/gltf-progressive
            git submodule update --init modules/three-animation-pointer
            git submodule update --init modules/needle-engine-modules

        - name: Setup Node.js
          uses: actions/setup-node@v4
          with:
            node-version: '24'

        - name: Compute cache key
          id: cache-key
          run: echo "key=node-modules-v1-${{ hashFiles(
            './js/package~/package-lock.json',
            './js/package~/tests/playwright/package-lock.json',
            './modules/gltf-progressive/package.json',
            './modules/three-animation-pointer/package.json'
            ) }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

        - name: Cache node_modules
          id: cache
          uses: actions/cache@v4
          with:
            path: |
              ./js/package~/node_modules
              ./js/package~/tests/playwright/node_modules
              ./modules/gltf-progressive/node_modules
              ./modules/three-animation-pointer/node_modules
            key: ${{ steps.cache-key.outputs.key }}
            restore-keys: |
              node-modules-v1-

        - name: Install dependencies
          if: steps.cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
          run: |
            npm install --prefix ./js/package~ &
            npm install --prefix ./js/package~/tests/playwright &
            (cd modules/gltf-progressive && npm install --force) &
            (cd modules/three-animation-pointer && npm install --force) &
            wait

    Detect-Engine-Tests:
        needs: Check-Changes
        if: needs.Check-Changes.outputs.has_changes == 'true'
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        outputs:
          matrix: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.matrix }}
        steps:
        - uses: actions/checkout@v4
          with:
            sparse-checkout: js/package~/plugins/test
        - name: Detect test.*.mjs scripts
          id: detect
          run: |
            TESTS=$(ls js/package~/plugins/test/test.*.mjs 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} basename {} .mjs | grep -v 'test\.utils' | sed 's/^test\.//' | jq -R -s -c 'split("\n") | map(select(length > 0))')
            echo "Detected test scripts: $TESTS"
            echo "matrix=${TESTS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

    Engine:
        needs: [Install, Detect-Engine-Tests]
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        timeout-minutes: 10
        strategy:
          fail-fast: false
          matrix:
            test: ${{ fromJson(needs.Detect-Engine-Tests.outputs.matrix) }}
        steps:
        - uses: actions/checkout@v4
          with:
            submodules: false
            token: ${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}

        - name: Initialize specific submodules
          run: |
            git config --global url."https://x-access-token:${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/"
            git submodule update --init modules/gltf-progressive
            git submodule update --init modules/three-animation-pointer
            git submodule update --init modules/needle-engine-modules

        - name: Setup Node.js
          uses: actions/setup-node@v4
          with:
            node-version: '24'

        - name: Restore node_modules
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: |
              ./js/package~/node_modules
              ./js/package~/tests/playwright/node_modules
              ./modules/gltf-progressive/node_modules
              ./modules/three-animation-pointer/node_modules
            key: ${{ needs.Install.outputs.cache-key }}

        - name: Run test.${{ matrix.test }}
          working-directory: ./js/package~
          run: node plugins/test/test.${{ matrix.test }}.mjs
          env:
            GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

        - name: Upload test results
          if: always()
          uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
          with:
            name: engine-results-${{ matrix.test }}
            path: ./js/package~/plugins/test-results/
            retention-days: 1

    Merge-Engine-Tests:
        needs: [Install, Engine]
        if: always() && needs.Engine.result != 'skipped'
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        timeout-minutes: 5
        steps:
        - uses: actions/checkout@v4
          with:
            submodules: false
            token: ${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}

        - name: Setup Node.js
          uses: actions/setup-node@v4
          with:
            node-version: '24'

        - name: Restore node_modules
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: |
              ./js/package~/node_modules
              ./js/package~/tests/playwright/node_modules
              ./modules/gltf-progressive/node_modules
              ./modules/three-animation-pointer/node_modules
            key: ${{ needs.Install.outputs.cache-key }}

        - name: Download all test results
          uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
          with:
            pattern: engine-results-*
            path: ./js/package~/plugins/test-results
            merge-multiple: true

        - name: Merge results and upload
          working-directory: ./js/package~
          run: node plugins/test/test.mjs --merge-only
          env:
            FTP_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.FTP_USERNAME }}
            FTP_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FTP_PASSWORD }}
            GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

    Run-Playwright-Tests:
        needs: [Check-Changes, Install]
        if: |
          needs.Check-Changes.outputs.has_changes == 'true' &&
          (github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' || github.event_name == 'workflow_call' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/test/') || inputs.playwright-grep != '')
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        timeout-minutes: 20
        strategy:
          fail-fast: false
          matrix:
            shard: [1/4, 2/4, 3/4, 4/4]
        steps:
        - uses: actions/checkout@v4
          with:
            submodules: false
            token: ${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}

        - name: Initialize specific submodules
          run: |
            git config --global url."https://x-access-token:${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/"
            git submodule update --init modules/gltf-progressive
            git submodule update --init modules/three-animation-pointer
            git submodule update --init modules/needle-engine-modules

        - name: Setup Node.js
          uses: actions/setup-node@v4
          with:
            node-version: '24'

        - name: Restore node_modules
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: |
              ./js/package~/node_modules
              ./js/package~/tests/playwright/node_modules
              ./modules/gltf-progressive/node_modules
              ./modules/three-animation-pointer/node_modules
            key: ${{ needs.Install.outputs.cache-key }}

        - name: Install Playwright browsers
          working-directory: ./js/package~/tests/playwright
          run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium

        - name: Generate per-test spec files for sharding
          working-directory: ./js/package~/tests/playwright
          run: node test-runner/generate-specs.mjs

        - name: Run Playwright tests (shard ${{ matrix.shard }})
          working-directory: ./js/package~/tests/playwright
          run: |
            if [ -n "$PLAYWRIGHT_GREP" ]; then
              npx playwright test --grep "$PLAYWRIGHT_GREP" --shard=${{ matrix.shard }}
            else
              npx playwright test --shard=${{ matrix.shard }}
            fi
          env:
            PLAYWRIGHT_GREP: ${{ inputs.playwright-grep }}

        - name: Save blob report to cache
          if: always()
          uses: actions/cache/save@v4
          with:
            path: ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/
            key: blob-report-${{ github.run_id }}-${{ strategy.job-index }}

    Merge-Playwright-Reports:
        needs: [Install, Run-Playwright-Tests]
        if: always() && needs.Run-Playwright-Tests.result != 'skipped'
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        timeout-minutes: 10
        steps:
        - uses: actions/checkout@v4
          with:
            submodules: false
            token: ${{ secrets.NEEDLE_ENGINE_TESTS_TOKEN }}

        - name: Setup Node.js
          uses: actions/setup-node@v4
          with:
            node-version: '24'

        - name: Restore node_modules
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: |
              ./js/package~/node_modules
              ./js/package~/tests/playwright/node_modules
              ./modules/gltf-progressive/node_modules
              ./modules/three-animation-pointer/node_modules
            key: ${{ needs.Install.outputs.cache-key }}

        - name: Prepare blob report directory
          run: mkdir -p ./js/package~/tests/playwright/all-blob-reports

        - name: Restore shard 0
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/
            key: blob-report-${{ github.run_id }}-0
        - run: cp -r ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/* ./js/package~/tests/playwright/all-blob-reports/ 2>/dev/null || true

        - name: Restore shard 1
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/
            key: blob-report-${{ github.run_id }}-1
        - run: cp -r ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/* ./js/package~/tests/playwright/all-blob-reports/ 2>/dev/null || true

        - name: Restore shard 2
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/
            key: blob-report-${{ github.run_id }}-2
        - run: cp -r ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/* ./js/package~/tests/playwright/all-blob-reports/ 2>/dev/null || true

        - name: Restore shard 3
          uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
          with:
            path: ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/
            key: blob-report-${{ github.run_id }}-3
        - run: cp -r ./js/package~/tests/playwright/blob-report/* ./js/package~/tests/playwright/all-blob-reports/ 2>/dev/null || true

        - name: Merge reports
          working-directory: ./js/package~/tests/playwright
          run: npx playwright merge-reports --reporter=html,./test-runner/reporters/needle-json.ts all-blob-reports

        - name: Upload merged report to FTP
          if: always()
          working-directory: ./js/package~/tests/playwright
          run: npm run upload:artifacts
          env:
            FTP_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.FTP_USERNAME_PLAYWRIGHT }}
            FTP_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.FTP_PASSWORD_PLAYWRIGHT }}

        - name: Write job summary
          if: always()
          run: |
            echo "### Playwright Test Report" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "[View Report](https://uploads.needle.tools/needle-engine/tests/${{ github.run_id }})" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

        - name: Notify Discord
          if: always()
          shell: bash
          env:
            DISCORD_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.DISCORD_TESTRUNNER_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          run: |
            if [ -z "$DISCORD_WEBHOOK" ]; then
              echo "DISCORD_WEBHOOK not set; skipping notification."
              exit 0
            fi

            STATUS="${{ needs.Run-Playwright-Tests.result }}"
            RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
            REPORT_URL="https://uploads.needle.tools/needle-engine/tests/${{ github.run_id }}"
            COMMIT="${{ github.sha }}"
            BRANCH="${{ github.ref_name }}"
            COMMIT_MESSAGE="${{ github.event.head_commit.message }}"

            if [ "$STATUS" = "success" ]; then
              EMOJI="✅"
            else
              EMOJI="❌"
            fi

            CONTENT="${EMOJI} Playwright tests **${STATUS}** on \`${BRANCH}\`\n\`${COMMIT_MESSAGE}\`\n[Test Report](${REPORT_URL}) | [Workflow Run](${RUN_URL})"

            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/discord_response.txt -w "%{http_code}" \
              -X POST "$DISCORD_WEBHOOK" \
              -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              --data-raw "{\"content\": \"$CONTENT\"}")
            echo "Discord response: $HTTP_CODE"
            cat /tmp/discord_response.txt || true

lines: - name: Generate per-test spec files for sharding
